# Contributing to nexus

We love contributions! Please read through these links to get started:

 - 🔢 [Contribution Guidelines](https://docs.nexus.com/development/contribution-guide)
 - 👾 [Local Development Setup Guide](https://docs.nexus.com/development/local-setup)
 - 🏷️ [Issues Tagged: `#help-wanted`](https://github.com/nexus/nexus/issues?q=is%3Aissue%20state%3Aopen%20label%3A%22help%20wanted%22)
